summary: First test cycle of C.R.A.S.H. 2.0 monitor dashboard. Backend (FastAPI + Mongo + WebSocket simulator) and frontend (React + Leaflet + WS client) tested end-to-end against the public preview URL. 20/20 backend pytest tests pass (auth, drivers, alerts lifecycle, admin RBAC, WebSocket snapshot+telemetry+auth). All 11 frontend Playwright flows pass (login bad/good creds, dashboard composition, WS 'En vivo' status, 8 drivers, telemetry bento updates on driver click, history page polyline-capable map + events panel, logout).

design_issues.screen: History page (/history/drv-01) immediately after first login
issues: Map area shows 'SIN TELEMETRÍA ALMACENADA TODAVÍA' empty state because telemetry is persisted only every ~10 simulator ticks (~20s); cosmetic but expected. Polyline appears once history accumulates.

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py uses bcrypt with proper $2b$ hash format and seed_users updates existing admin password if changed — correct.

server.py CORS uses allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True; the env var CORS_ORIGINS is ignored. Works for preview but tighten in production (browsers reject wildcard with credentials so the regex bypasses that — acceptable here).
WebSocket /api/ws correctly closes with 4401 on missing/invalid token and accepts token via query param or cookie — verified.
No brute-force lockout (5 fails -> lock) is implemented; not in this task's scope but worth noting since playbook mentions it.
MongoDB _id is excluded from all read endpoints via projection {'_id': 0} — good.
simulator alert lifecycle: ack and false_alarm transition states correctly and reset driver to active — verified end-to-end.
test_credentials: admin@crash.io / admin123 (admin), monitor@crash.io / monitor123 (monitor) — verified in /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: None; backend seed_users runs at startup and was used as-is.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth (login/me/logout, bad creds, cookie+bearer), drivers (list=8, detail, 404, history, events, unauth=401), alerts (list, invalid ack/false-alarm 404, full pending->acknowledged->false_alarm lifecycle by polling simulator up to 90s), admin RBAC (admin 200, monitor 403), and WebSocket (no-token closes, token snapshot+telemetry_batch within 8s). The alert lifecycle test is probabilistic and may need ~60–120s; run it standalone if it skips. Frontend: data-testids are stable (login-page, login-email, login-password, login-submit, login-error, ws-status, driver-list, driver-list-item-{id}, driver-history-{id}, telemetry-bento, telemetry-bento-empty, alerts-center, alert-{id}, alert-ack-{id}, alert-false-{id}, live-map, history-map, events-list, back-to-dashboard, logout-btn, alert-count, alerts-mute-toggle, alerts-tab-{k}). WebSocket warnings 'closed before connection established' appear on navigate/logout — expected (component unmount).
